home.welcomeFirst: Hello, it's great to have you here. Today we'll review how your health is doing, calmly and without rush.
home.welcomeReturning: Hello again. Your last visit was {{days}} days ago. Would you like to record new data?
home.welcomeReturningToday: Hello again. Your last visit was today. Would you like to record new data?
home.privacyNotice: Your data is stored only on this device. Nothing is sent to the internet.
